title: Cobblemon icons
description: This pack will now only be updated within "Miner's Icons" and is discontinued as a standalone pack.
body:
![The name o da game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f42de2d08bffbcdae66526a9cb329ad87787d649.png)

# THIS PACK IS DISCONTINUED
**But not entirely, Look for "Miner's Icons", Cobblemon Icons will now be apart of this pack and will be included, this Cobblemon Icons as a standalone pack is now discontinued.**

# What This Pack Does

**This is a resource pack for Xaero's Minimap, so it may not work with other minimaps. This pack tries to give accurate looking icons while also supporting datapacks made by the community.**

# Info To Know About Versions 1.0-1.4

**Versions 1.0 - 1.4 Used [Kiece's cobblemon icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/kiece-minimap-icons-cobblemon) as a base pack because I had no clue how to make something like it, I only knew how to draw the icons, and I used it to learn. Any version past 1.4 doesn't have a base pack.**

<details>
<summary>
Compatable(For Older Versions) Packs And Other Links
</summary>

# [Alatia's fakemon pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-alatias-fakemon-pack)

An amazing fakemon pack that adds 3 new starters and a lot of cool variants and evolutions.
Amazing pack by Doctor X, and was really kind about my pretty big mistake.(I forgot to ask them if it was okay to support their pack. I am also pretty sure this is the only time I made this mistake.)

# [Cobblemon delta](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemondelta)

A really cool server that adds cool custom pokemon, but mostly just variants. This server also has a really cool mega evolution system.

# [Gravelmon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gravelmon)

A side mod that adds a lot of fan made pokemon. I am also now a developer on this project.

</details>

<details>
<summary>
Stories Cause I Feel Like It
</summary>

<details>
<summary>
The story of how I made a few models for gravelmon
</summary>

## How I got into the team

**I was messing around with the mod when I saw that delta cyndaquil had no model, so I made one and showed it off in their discord server. Drai had reached out to me after that and told me that my model was great and asked if I wanted to join gravelmon, I said yes and said I had already sent in an application to join.**

</details>


<details>
<summary>
A story that is half related to this pack aka, what happened to some(not all) of the older versions of this pack
</summary>

**not THAT long ago my laptop stopped working, went to eternal blue screen, so I waited and tried to fix it myself for I don't remember how long, until we had a professional look at it and fix it. long story short, this laptop now has 2 hard drives and I was finally able to do what I loved again(make games and other stuff, it's what I do, not a day passes by with out me doing something like that.), anyway when I got my laptop back I had no access to the original hard drives files, so I had accepted the loss and moved on, until I recently(forgot why) tried to acces the files on that hard drive and got a shocking realization that I indeed now had access to ALL of my old files. that was why I remade the pack from scratch twice. Note: This story is a mess and yes, I will be editing this down and cleaning it up, this pack is still a huge mess but I like where everything is headed.**

</details>
